properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You saved me and brought me to life, You clothed me and brought back my sight. I'll be what you want. I'll go where You lead For You are my Saviour, my God.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: My days and nights I offer You, my life, my soul I give to You, My dreams, my thoughts, my everything in joy and praise i'll sing Your name. This offering I give I offer You myself. My Lord receive this offering of love.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I'll do what You want of to do. I'll utter what You want me to say I'll be what You want me to do. I'll go where You lead, for You are my saviour, my God.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You taught me how to give, You showed me how to live You showed me the meaning
